neovim.description: vim/neovim config, plugins, LSP, keybindings, snippets, spelling

shell & terminal.description: zsh, tmux, aliases, prompt, terminal emulator

dev tools.description: git, R, python, conda, rust, ocaml, snakemake, latex, gdb

infrastructure.description: setup.sh, brew, tailscale, router, bootloaders, keyboards, fonts

AI tooling.description: claude code, dewey agent, skills, arcana

chores & docs.note: Explicitly matched files only. Unmatched files get category 'other' (not a fallback — signals a gap in the schema).

exclude.description: Vendor/generated files excluded from analysis — not authored config

classification_rules.method: Per commit, extract git --stat file paths and lines changed. Each file is classified by first matching path_patterns entry (checked in category order). Commit gets a weight vector across categories proportional to lines changed per category.
classification_rules.mixed_commits: Weighted by lines added+removed per file, split across categories.
classification_rules.merge_commits: Classified by files in the merge diff, or chores & docs if empty.

data_format.grain: (commit, file) tuple — one row per file changed per commit
data_format.notes: Binary files get added=0, removed=0. Renames show the destination path. Aggregate by commit, month, category, etc. as needed for plots.
